name: Aarav N.
title: Best UI among indie players
comment: Smooth playback, beautiful transitions, and queue controls feel premium.

name: Maya S.
title: Offline downloads are great
comment: I use downloads daily while commuting. Search recommendations are super helpful.

name: Dev P.
title: Playlist management is clean
comment: Creating playlists and adding tracks is quick. Love the mini player UX.
